The Duke of Zhou said, “If a country is governed by what is right, then it will be a country of righteousness. The stars do not think of changing their course, and so they are bright. If wisdom is used as a tool, then the son of a wise man will live in the wilderness. The wise man is the shepherd of the people. After the law is established, then the country is governed. When the people do not fear the mountains, then the family is preserved in the marketplace.”
